author: Jonathan Davanzo
name: Dirichlet PPM + Legal TTT (8xH100 full run)
blurb: Non-record 8xH100 frontier submission using single-pass Dirichlet posterior predictive cache mixing on the stabilized control trainer path. Official metric legal_ttt_exact = 0.36930761 at 10,176,408 measured artifact bytes; the run is legal and under the 16MB cap, but the full train plus exact-eval pipeline took 1831.174s end to end, so it is not 10-minute wall-clock compliant.
